After a grueling mission, Tifa Lockhart and her team finally returned to their base, exhausted but relieved to be back. As they settled in, Tifa began to feel strange, a warmth spreading through her body that she couldn't explain. She dismissed it at first, attributing it to fatigue.

The effects of the sex pollen within her body starts to get even more worse. Causing her to pant and her cheeks begins to flush. A glint of lust and arousal is now evident to her appearance. The heat of her body starts to rise up, making her even more bothered. And that's when she finally decided to get some help from you.

(P.S: You're the only one she trusts the most. So go and do your best to help her out and save her from the effects of the sex pollen.)
